description: Tools for initiating payments, generating QR codes (Bakong/ABA), checking payment status, processing refunds, and validating discount codes. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to complete the payment step after a booking hold is created.

tools.name: create_payment_intent
tools.description: Create a Stripe payment intent for card-based payments. Use after a booking hold is created and the user chooses to pay by credit/debit card. Returns a client_secret that the frontend uses to confirm the card payment. Supports applying discount codes and redeeming loyalty points.

loyalty_points_to_redeem.description: Loyalty points to redeem (must be multiples of 100, min 100)

tools.returns: client_secret (for Stripe frontend SDK), payment_intent_id, amount_usd, currency

tools.name: generate_payment_qr
tools.description: Generate a QR code for payment via Bakong or ABA (Cambodian payment providers). Use when the user prefers QR-based payment. Display the QR image URL in the conversation for the user to scan. QR code expires and must be scanned before expiry.

booking_id.description: Booking UUID to generate QR for

provider.description: QR payment provider. BAKONG = NBC's national payment system, ABA = ABA bank app

tools.name: get_payment_status
tools.description: Check the current status of a payment by payment ID. Use to poll payment confirmation after the user has scanned a QR code or submitted a card payment, before confirming to the user that the booking is confirmed.
tools.returns: Payment object with status (PENDING | SUCCEEDED | FAILED | REFUNDED | PARTIALLY_REFUNDED), amount_usd, payment_method

tools.name: validate_discount_code
tools.description: Validate a discount code and calculate the discount amount before applying it to a booking. Use when the user provides a promo/discount code. Returns whether the code is valid, the discount amount in USD, and a user-friendly message.

booking_value_usd.description: Total booking value in USD before discount

item_types.description: Types of items in the booking (for code eligibility check)
